prologue.title: First Flight
prologue.description: Welcome, pilot. Your shuttle is ready at Bay 7. Head to the asteroid field to begin your training.
prologue.starting_dialog: Dispatch: Pilot, this is your first flight. Follow the nav beacon to the training area. Use WASD to move and the mouse wheel to zoom.
prologue.completion_dialog: Dispatch: Good flying, rookie. Now head back to the station for your next assignment.

objectives.description: Move your ship to the asteroid field marker

prologue.title: Target Practice
prologue.description: Your shuttle has been fitted with a basic laser. Destroy 3 training drones to prove your aim.
prologue.starting_dialog: Dispatch: Weapons online. Three drones are waiting at the training range. Watch your weapon arcs — you can only fire forward.
prologue.completion_dialog: Dispatch: Direct hits! You're a natural. Return to station for shield installation.

prologue.title: Pirate Ambush
prologue.description: Pirate scouts have been spotted near the shipping lanes. Your shields are online — time for real combat.
prologue.starting_dialog: Dispatch: Incoming distress call! Two pirate scouts are attacking a cargo hauler. Move to intercept!
prologue.completion_dialog: Dispatch: Pirates neutralized. The hauler is safe. You've earned your pay today.

prologue.title: Distress Call
prologue.description: A civilian transport is under attack. Escort them to safety while their engines reboot.
prologue.starting_dialog: Transport Captain: Mayday! Mayday! Our engines are down! Pirates swarming! We need 3 turns to spool up the FTL drive!
prologue.completion_dialog: Transport Captain: Thank you! The FTL is online. We owe you our lives. Here — take this engine component.

prologue.title: The Anomaly
prologue.description: Sensors picked up a strange energy signature in the nebula. Investigate and collect a sample.
prologue.starting_dialog: Science Officer: Captain, I'm reading unusual quantum fluctuations. We should scan the area and collect a sample if possible.
prologue.completion_dialog: Science Officer: Fascinating! This crystal resonates at a frequency I've never seen. Run a full analysis when we're back.

prologue.title: Sector Sweep
prologue.description: The pirate presence in this sector has grown too large. Eliminate 4 pirate vessels to secure the area.
prologue.starting_dialog: Fleet Command: Pilot, we're preparing a major operation. First, we need the sector clear of hostiles. Take out any pirate ships you find.
prologue.completion_dialog: Fleet Command: Sector secure. Excellent work, pilot. The shipyard has a Fighter class ready for you. You've earned an upgrade.

prologue.title: Pirate Base Assault
prologue.description: The pirate leader's corvette is hiding in an asteroid fortress. Infiltrate and destroy it.
prologue.starting_dialog: Fleet Command: Final mission, pilot. The pirate leader is in the asteroid belt. Their corvette is heavily armed — watch for the second phase. When shields hit 50%, they'll call reinforcements.
prologue.completion_dialog: Fleet Command: Pirate leader eliminated! The sector is free. Congratulations, pilot — the gateway to Sector 2 is open. Your new Fighter awaits.

main_story.title: Corruption in the Federation
main_story.description: Welcome to Federation Space. Admiral Chen has requested your presence at Starbase Omega. There's a mole in the command structure.
main_story.starting_dialog: Admiral Chen: Pilot, glad you made it. We have a problem. Someone is leaking patrol routes to pirates. I need you to investigate a suspicious cargo ship.
main_story.completion_dialog: Admiral Chen: The cargo ship had Federation encryption keys. This reaches higher than I thought. I'm assigning you to the Border Worlds — the source of these leaks.

objectives.description: Report to Admiral Chen at Starbase Omega
Board and investigate the cargo ship 'Merchant's Hope'

main_story.title: The Mole Unmasked
main_story.description: The trail leads to a Federation admiral who's been selling intel to the Dominion. Confront them.
main_story.starting_dialog: Admiral Chen: I have the evidence. Admiral Torak has been compromised. But he's fortified his position in the Forge asteroid base. Take him down.
main_story.completion_dialog: Admiral Chen: Torak is in custody. The Dominion connection is confirmed. The Border Worlds are next — they're planning something big.

main_story.title: Relic of the Ancients
main_story.description: The Border Worlds are in chaos. A smuggler claims to have found an Ancient artifact. Secure it before the Dominion does.
main_story.starting_dialog: Smuggler: I found something big in the debris of the old war. A relic. The Dominion wants it. The Void Nomads want it. Everyone wants it. I just want to stay alive.
main_story.completion_dialog: The artifact hums with power. You feel a strange presence — as if something is watching through it. The coordinates of another artifact are engraved on its surface.

objectives.description: Defend the smuggler from Dominion assassins

main_story.title: The Zerath Collective
main_story.description: The Zerath Collective controls this sector. They have developed advanced ion technology that could be crucial against the Dominion.
main_story.starting_dialog: Zerath Ambassador: You carry the scent of the Ancients. Interesting. We may have common interests. Help us with a nest of Void Spectres, and we will share our knowledge.
main_story.completion_dialog: Ambassador: You have proven yourself. The ion technology is yours. But remember — every gift from the Zerath comes with a price.

main_story.title: The Iron Wastes
main_story.description: Civil war rages in the Dominion territories. A faction within the Dominion wants to negotiate — they claim to have another artifact.
main_story.starting_dialog: Defector: I am General Vex of the Iron Dominion. We have the Artifact of Protection. The war council wants to use it as a weapon. I want to prevent that. Help me, and it is yours.
main_story.completion_dialog: General Vex: The artifact is secured. With this, you can shield entire fleets. The Void Rifts hold the key to the third artifact — the Artifact of Travel.

objectives.description: Meet General Vex at the rendezvous point
Sabotage the Dominion war council's command ship

main_story.title: The Voice in the Void
main_story.description: The Void Rifts are unstable space-time anomalies. Something is calling from within. The final artifact — the Artifact of Travel — is hidden here.
main_story.starting_dialog: Void Nomad Guide: The Rifts whisper, captain. They speak of a great consciousness sleeping in the Ancient Core. The Artifact of Travel can open the way. But the Rifts are treacherous.
main_story.completion_dialog: All three artifacts resonate together. A star chart appears — the path to the Ancient Core in Sector 7. The final journey awaits.

objectives.description: Navigate through the Void Rift maze

final_act.title: F1: The Awakening
final_act.description: The Ancient Core looms before you. The Custodians have detected the artifacts. You must convince them — or fight through.
final_act.starting_dialog: Ancient Custodian: You carry the Three Keys. We have watched you since the Border Worlds. The Consciousness stirs. You may enter — but only those worthy may face the Nexus.
final_act.completion_dialog: The path is open. Three trials await. Prepare yourself for the hardest battles of your life.

objectives.description: Prove your worth to the Ancient Custodians

final_act.title: F2: The Three Trials
final_act.description: Three trials await: Combat — survive 8 waves. Strategy — navigate a trap-filled maze in 20 moves. Survival — destroy 3 generators while your energy drains.
final_act.starting_dialog: Custodian: First — prove your strength. Second — prove your mind. Third — prove your will. Survive all three, and the Void Key is yours.
final_act.completion_dialog: The Void Key glows in your hands. The Nexus chamber is opening. The Ancient Consciousness awaits.

objectives.description: Survive 8 waves of elite guardians (Combat Trial)
Navigate the trap maze in 20 moves (Strategy Trial)
Destroy 3 generators while energy drains (Survival Trial)

final_act.title: F3: The Nexus
final_act.description: The Ancient Consciousness. Four phases. Your choices and crew will determine the fate of the galaxy.
final_act.starting_dialog: Ancient Consciousness: So. You have come. Through fire, void, and time. The galaxy has many paths. Choose yours wisely — this choice cannot be unmade.
final_act.completion_dialog: The galaxy trembles. A new age begins. Your name will echo through eternity.

objectives.description: Phase 1: Survive the Ancient Consciousness's beams
Phase 3: Escape the gravity well and destroy the core
Phase 4: Final confrontation — no shields, true damage only
